"'''Who's Who in the Outlander Club: It's Ladies' Night'''" was an article appearing in [[Star Wars Insider 75|''Star Wars Insider'' 75]], written by [[Daniel Wallace]] with special thanks to [[Pablo Hidalgo]]. It provides photos and brief descriptions of over forty patrons of the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]] as seen in [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']].
